title: PR command reports diff failures clearly
description: Black-box smoke for `orca pr` when PR metadata loads but `gh pr diff` fails.
input: Stub `gh` so version and `pr view` succeed but `gh pr diff` fails, run `orca pr 123`, and verify the command reports the fetch failure rooted in diff retrieval.
command:
bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; TMP_ROOT=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf $TMP_ROOT" EXIT; mkdir -p "$TMP_ROOT/bin" "$TMP_ROOT/home"; cat > "$TMP_ROOT/bin/gh" <<'"'"'EOF'"'"'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
if [[ "$1" == "--version" ]]; then echo "gh version 9.9.9"; exit 0; fi
if [[ "$1" == "pr" && "$2" == "view" ]]; then
  if [[ "${7:-}" == ".title" ]]; then echo "Demo PR"; exit 0; fi
  if [[ "${7:-}" == ".body" ]]; then echo "Demo body"; exit 0; fi
fi
if [[ "$1" == "pr" && "$2" == "diff" ]]; then echo "diff failed" >&2; exit 1; fi
exit 1
EOF
chmod +x "$TMP_ROOT/bin/gh"; OUTPUT=$(env -i PATH="$TMP_ROOT/bin:$PATH" HOME="$TMP_ROOT/home" node dist/bin/orca.js pr 123 2>&1; STATUS=$?; printf "status=%s\n%s\n" "$STATUS" "$OUTPUT"); printf "%s\n" "$OUTPUT"; printf "%s" "$OUTPUT" | grep -q "status=1"'
